title: Mullanite lattice-sculpture
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Mullanite lattice-sculpture''' was an artform that used specially constructed lattices, on which were grown creeping vines of [[Mullanite]]. The [[University of Rudrig/Legends|University of Rudrig]] was home to at least one of these sculptures, which was situated near the headquarters of the university's [[Curriculum Committee]], until [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] drove a [[groundlimo]] through it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]''

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
